events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: motor circuits & disconnects, disconnect not within sight. NEC Article 430 requires a disconnecting means for motors, and generally must be in sight from the motor location (within sight, not more than 50 ft) unless the disconnect can be locked in the open position. If not within sight, it's non-compliant unless a lockable disconnect is provided. The observed condition is "disconnect not within sight" — this is a code violation. Work is rough-complete. Decision: fail. Risk: high (could be critical). Component conditions: non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80. Confidence high.

    "Motor disconnect is not within sight of the motor/controller, violating NEC Art. 430 disconnecting means location requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate or install an additional disconnect within sight of the motor, or provide a lockable disconnect in accordance with NEC Art. 430 exceptions.",
    "Do not energize the motor circuit until the disconnect location is corrected and verified."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 430 requires the motor disconnecting means to be located in sight from the motor location and the driven machinery, or to be capable of being locked in the open position. A disconnect not within sight without an approved lockout provision is non-compliant and creates a safety hazard during maintenance.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 430 - Part IX (Disconnecting Means)"
  ]
